use_codes.desc: METHOD FOR PREVENTING ITCHING ASSOCIATED WITH ALLERGIC CONJUNCTIVITIS
USE OF LASTACAFT TO TEMPORARY RELIEVE ITCHY EYES DUE TO POLLEN, RAGWEED, GRASS, ANIMAL HAIR AND DANDER
